Cabinet.metaDescription: Ultra-niche positioning: focus on a decisive moment, sensitive mandates, organizations under strain.
Cabinet.title: Xten Partners
Cabinet.p1: We have led organizational transformations from the inside throughout our careers.
Cabinet.p2: We know what it is like for organizations that must keep running while their reference points shift.
Cabinet.p3: There is always a decisive moment for the future trajectory: when the organization identifies the leaders who will have to carry the transformation.
Cabinet.p4: Xten Partners exists for that precise moment.
Cabinet.founderTitle: Antoine Chauvière, founder of Xten Partners
